summary: Dashboard loading state displays correctly with proper authenticated UI layout, billing estimate, usage metrics, and navigation. Minor palette inconsistency with generic neutral backgrounds instead of diner aesthetic, and missing beta framing violate brand manifesto but don't break core functionality.

violations.description: Dashboard uses neutral gray/white UI defaults instead of diner palette surfaces - should use cream #fff8ea for card backgrounds rather than generic white
Public beta framing is present in banner but could be more explicit - current implementation shows beta notice but doesn't emphasize the beta state strongly enough
Logged-in dashboard surface uses generic palette while public routes use distinct diner treatment, creating brand discontinuity after login

actions: Apply diner palette to authenticated surfaces - use cream #fff8ea for card backgrounds instead of white
Strengthen beta framing with more explicit treatment using .beta-badge component styling
Ensure visual consistency between public marketing and authenticated dashboard surfaces
